calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-26-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Renee De Torres for Petitioner.

The Court stated that the Executor should bear the costs for preparation of his creditor's claim. In addition, the Court reduced the fees by that amount and signed the modified Order in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
Bailiff: Deputy Lee.
